name: internet-business-skills
description: Commercial analysis skills for narrow, evidence-based internet business research.

interface.shortDescription: Evidence-based commercial research skills for Codex.
interface.longDescription: A compact skill pack for bad review mining, competitor analysis, audience portrayal, and commercial idea verification.
defaultPrompt: Verify this ecommerce idea with public evidence.
Analyze competitor positioning for this product.
Find representative bad reviews for this product.
